nasb.text: You shall bring in the table and arrange what belongs on it; and you shall bring in the lampstand and mount its lamps.

esv.text: And you shall bring in the table and arrange it, and you shall bring in the lampstand and set up its lamps.

cnv.text: 把桌子搬進去，擺上陳設物；把燈臺也搬進去，把燈臺上的燈盞點著。

ccb.text: 把桌子搬进去，摆好桌上的器具，再把灯台搬进去，点上灯，
